sections.paragraph:
ἁγνότης, ητος, ἡ purity, sincerity (s. ἁγνός; Cornutus 32 p. 67, 2; IG IV, 588, 15 [II a.d.] δικαιοσύνης ἕνεκεν καὶ ἁγνότητος) ἐν ἁγνότητι 2 Cor 6:6; in 11:3 (w. ἁπλότης) it is a questioned reading, though w. very ancient attestation. ἁ. τῆς ἀληθείας true purity Hv 3, 7, 3; πορεύεσθαι ἐν ἁ. lead a pure life m 4, 4, 4.—M-M. TW.

Cornutus Cornutus , I a.d.—List 5

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

Hv Hv = Visions

m m = Mandates

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 13
